_schema._note: Reference only — not processed by the loader. Copy an entry from easterEggs and edit it.

fields.discover: optional — discovery ID to fire on trigger
fields.glitchOpts: optional — object of options for the glitch effect

glitch_effects: scanlines       — CRT scanline overlay (10s, or persistent with glitchOpts.persistent)
majorGlitch     — combo: heavyFlicker + screenTear + phantomLine + crtBand
gate_syntax: "flag:pkg-initialized"  — requires this flag to be set
"the-signal:contacted"  — requires driver state in or past 'contacted'
match_keys: "exact input"         — matches only this exact string
"* please"            — matches anything ending with ' please'

*===D*.response: command not found. What the fuck kind of site do you think this is?!
